message:
fix: harden fork+PR fallback in gt done

- Force push to fork (safe: it's the polecat's own fork, retries need this)
- Validate gitURLToOwnerRepo returns exactly owner/repo (reject paths with extra segments)
- Set cmd.Dir on gh pr create exec for correct working directory
- Add test cases for malformed GitHub URLs with extra path segments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
